mapper.select: select distinct TABLEINFOID from synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO where upper(TABLENAME) = upper(#{tableName}) and upper(PROJECT_NAME) = upper(#{projectName}) and DATAID = #{dataId} and rownum = 1
select distinct TABLEINFOID from synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO where upper(TABLENAME) = upper(#{tableName}) and upper(TABLEID) = upper(#{tableId}) and DATAID = #{dataId} and rownum = 1

select value, label from (select distinct cast(store_type as CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci as value, 'storeType' COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci as label from synlte.object_store_info where store_type is not null order by value asc) a union all select value, label from (select distinct project_name COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci as value, 'projectName' COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci as label from synlte.object_store_info where project_name is not null order by value asc) b union all select value, label from (select distinct CREATER COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci as value, 'CREATER' COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci as label from synlte.object_store_info where CREATER is not null order by value asc) c union all select value, label from (select distinct dataid COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci as value, 'dataid' COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci as label from synlte.object_store_info where dataid is not null order by value asc) d
mapper.update:
update synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO set TABLEID = #{item.tableId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OBJECTNAME = #{item.objectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMPORT_FLAG = #{item.importFlag, jdbcType=INTEGER}, ISPARTITION = #{item.isPartition, jdbcType=INTEGER},
PARTITIONTYPE = #{item.partitionType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
PARTITIONCOUNT = #{item.partitionCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
LIFECYCLE = #{item.lifeCycle, jdbcType=INTEGER}, TABLE_MOD_TIME = sysdate where upper(TABLENAME) = upper(#{item.tableName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(PROJECT_NAME) = upper(#{item.projectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(DATAID) = upper(#{item.dataId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLEINFOID) = upper(#{item.tableInfoId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select TABLEID from synlte.object_store_info where dataid in (select res_id from ds_data_resource)
